title: balsamina roylei
intro: Balsamina roylei, also known as Royle's balsam or Balsam of Gilead, is a plant species that belongs to the balsam family and is native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has various health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, reducing fever, and relieving joint pain and inflammation. Balsamina roylei can be used in herbal preparations like essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
